subject: Throw specific InterruptedException
commit_message:
Throw specific InterruptedException

Fix sonar exception issue by throwing specific error
https://sonar.onap.org/issues/search#issues=AVvDtnXjtgRA9ZMwY7qw

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Concerned that this could open door to uncaught exception

Abandoned

Once projects are formed I will update this to better handle specific errors.

Patch Set 1:

> Concerned that this could open door to uncaught exception

Thread.sleep(long) API defines only two thrown Exception(s):

https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/lang/Thread.html#sleep-long-

1) IllegalArgumentException: if the value of millis is negative, or the value of nanos is not in the range 0-999999
This obviously won't happen since it is hardcoded to a positive value in that range here.
2) InterruptedException: if any thread has interrupted the current thread. The interrupted status of the current thread is cleared when this exception is thrown.

Only the latter needs to be caught.  In fact, most sonar analysis tools will yell at you for catching Throwable or Exception!  It is considered bad practice to throw these base class implementations anyway.
